3407 out_r->uv1 = ImVec2((float)(r->x + r->w), (float)(r->y + r->h)) * TexUvScale;
3408 return true;
3409}
3410
3411bool ImFontAtlasGetMouseCursorTexData(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImGuiMouseCursor cursor_type, ImVec2* out_offset, ImVec2* out_size, ImVec2 out_uv_border[2], ImVec2 out_uv_fill[2])
3412{
3413 if (cursor_type <= ImGuiMouseCursor_None || cursor_type >= ImGuiMouseCursor_COUNT)
3414 return false;
3415 if (atlas->Flags & ImFontAtlasFlags_NoMouseCursors)
3416 return false;
3417
3418 ImTextureRect* r = ImFontAtlasPackGetRect(atlas, atlas->Builder->PackIdMouseCursors);
3419 ImVec2 pos = FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_CURSOR_DATA[cursor_type][0] + ImVec2((float)r->x, (float)r->y);
3420 ImVec2 size = FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_CURSOR_DATA[cursor_type][1];
3421 *out_size = size;
3422 *out_offset = FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_CURSOR_DATA[cursor_type][2];
3423 out_uv_border[0] = (pos) * atlas->TexUvScale;
3424 out_uv_border[1] = (pos + size) * atlas->TexUvScale;
3425 pos.x += FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_DATA_W + 1;
3426 out_uv_fill[0] = (pos) * atlas->TexUvScale;
3427 out_uv_fill[1] = (pos + size) * atlas->TexUvScale;
3428 return true;
3429}
3430
3431// When atlas->RendererHasTextures = true, this is only called if no font were loaded.
3432void ImFontAtlasBuildMain(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
3433{
3434 IM_ASSERT(!atlas->Locked && "Cannot modify a locked ImFontAtlas!");
3435 if (atlas->TexData && atlas->TexData->Format != atlas->TexDesiredFormat)
3436 ImFontAtlasBuildClear(atlas);
3437
3438 if (atlas->Builder == NULL)
3439 ImFontAtlasBuildInit(atlas);
3440
3441 // Default font is none are specified
3442 if (atlas->Sources.Size == 0)
3443 atlas->AddFontDefault();
3444
3445 // [LEGACY] For backends not supporting RendererHasTextures: preload all glyphs
3446 ImFontAtlasBuildUpdateRendererHasTexturesFromContext(atlas);
3447 if (atlas->RendererHasTextures == false) // ~ImGuiBackendFlags_RendererHasTextures
3448 ImFontAtlasBuildLegacyPreloadAllGlyphRanges(atlas);
3449 atlas->TexIsBuilt = true;
3450}
3451
3452void ImFontAtlasBuildGetOversampleFactors(ImFontConfig* src, ImFontBaked* baked, int* out_oversample_h, int* out_oversample_v)
3453{
3454 // (Only used by stb_truetype builder)
3455 // Automatically disable horizontal oversampling over size 36
3456 const float raster_size = baked->Size * baked->RasterizerDensity * src->RasterizerDensity;
3457 *out_oversample_h = (src->OversampleH != 0) ? src->OversampleH : (raster_size > 36.0f || src->PixelSnapH) ? 1 : 2;
3458 *out_oversample_v = (src->OversampleV != 0) ? src->OversampleV : 1;
3459}
3460
3461// Setup main font loader for the atlas
3462// Every font source (ImFontConfig) will use this unless ImFontConfig::FontLoader specify a custom loader.
3463void ImFontAtlasBuildSetupFontLoader(ImFontAtlas* atlas, const ImFontLoader* font_loader)
3464{
3465 if (atlas->FontLoader == font_loader)
3466 return;
3467 IM_ASSERT(!atlas->Locked && "Cannot modify a locked ImFontAtlas!");
3468
3469 for (ImFont* font : atlas->Fonts)
3470 ImFontAtlasFontDestroyOutput(atlas, font);
3471 if (atlas->Builder && atlas->FontLoader && atlas->FontLoader->LoaderShutdown)
3472 atlas->FontLoader->LoaderShutdown(atlas);
3473
3474 atlas->FontLoader = font_loader;
3475 atlas->FontLoaderName = font_loader ? font_loader->Name : "NULL";
3476 IM_ASSERT(atlas->FontLoaderData == NULL);
3477
3478 if (atlas->Builder && atlas->FontLoader && atlas->FontLoader->LoaderInit)
3479 atlas->FontLoader->LoaderInit(atlas);
3480 for (ImFont* font : atlas->Fonts)
3481 ImFontAtlasFontInitOutput(atlas, font);
3482 for (ImFont* font : atlas->Fonts)
3483 for (ImFontConfig* src : font->Sources)
3484 ImFontAtlasFontSourceAddToFont(atlas, font, src);
3485}
3486
3487// Preload all glyph ranges for legacy backends.
3488// This may lead to multiple texture creation which might be a little slower than before.
3489void ImFontAtlasBuildLegacyPreloadAllGlyphRanges(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
3490{
3491 atlas->Builder->PreloadedAllGlyphsRanges = true;
3492 for (ImFont* font : atlas->Fonts)
3493 {
3494 ImFontBaked* baked = font->GetFontBaked(font->LegacySize);
3495 if (font->FallbackChar != 0)
3496 baked->FindGlyph(font->FallbackChar);
3497 if (font->EllipsisChar != 0)
3498 baked->FindGlyph(font->EllipsisChar);
3499 for (ImFontConfig* src : font->Sources)
3500 {
3501 const ImWchar* ranges = src->GlyphRanges ? src->GlyphRanges : atlas->GetGlyphRangesDefault();
3502 for (; ranges[0]; ranges += 2)
3503 for (unsigned int c = ranges[0]; c <= ranges[1] && c <= IM_UNICODE_CODEPOINT_MAX; c++) //-V560
3504 baked->FindGlyph((ImWchar)c);
3505 }
3506 }
3507}
3508
3509// FIXME: May make ImFont::Sources a ImSpan<> and move ownership to ImFontAtlas
3510void ImFontAtlasBuildUpdatePointers(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
3511{
3512 for (ImFont* font : atlas->Fonts)
3513 font->Sources.resize(0);
3514 for (ImFontConfig& src : atlas->Sources)
3515 src.DstFont->Sources.push_back(&src);
3516}
3517
3518// Render a white-colored bitmap encoded in a string
3519void ImFontAtlasBuildRenderBitmapFromString(ImFontAtlas* atlas, int x, int y, int w, int h, const char* in_str, char in_marker_char)
3520{
3521 ImTextureData* tex = atlas->TexData;
3522 IM_ASSERT(x >= 0 && x + w <= tex->Width);
3523 IM_ASSERT(y >= 0 && y + h <= tex->Height);
3524
3525 switch (tex->Format)
3526 {
3527 case ImTextureFormat_Alpha8:
3528 {
3529 ImU8* out_p = (ImU8*)tex->GetPixelsAt(x, y);
3530 for (int off_y = 0; off_y < h; off_y++, out_p += tex->Width, in_str += w)
3531 for (int off_x = 0; off_x < w; off_x++)
3532 out_p[off_x] = (in_str[off_x] == in_marker_char) ? 0xFF : 0x00;
3533 break;
3534 }
3535 case ImTextureFormat_RGBA32:
3536 {
3537 ImU32* out_p = (ImU32*)tex->GetPixelsAt(x, y);
3538 for (int off_y = 0; off_y < h; off_y++, out_p += tex->Width, in_str += w)
3539 for (int off_x = 0; off_x < w; off_x++)
3540 out_p[off_x] = (in_str[off_x] == in_marker_char) ? IM_COL32_WHITE : IM_COL32_BLACK_TRANS;
3541 break;
3542 }
3543 }
3544}
3545
3546static void ImFontAtlasBuildUpdateBasicTexData(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
3547{
3548 // Pack and store identifier so we can refresh UV coordinates on texture resize.
3549 // FIXME-NEWATLAS: User/custom rects where user code wants to store UV coordinates will need to do the same thing.
3550 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
3551 ImVec2i pack_size = (atlas->Flags & ImFontAtlasFlags_NoMouseCursors) ? ImVec2i(2, 2) : ImVec2i(FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_DATA_W * 2 + 1, FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_DATA_H);
3552
3553 ImFontAtlasRect r;
3554 bool add_and_draw = (atlas->GetCustomRect(builder->PackIdMouseCursors, &r) == false);
3555 if (add_and_draw)
3556 {
3557 builder->PackIdMouseCursors = atlas->AddCustomRect(pack_size.x, pack_size.y, &r);
3558 IM_ASSERT(builder->PackIdMouseCursors != ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid);
3559
3560 // Draw to texture
3561 if (atlas->Flags & ImFontAtlasFlags_NoMouseCursors)
3562 {
3563 // 2x2 white pixels
3564 ImFontAtlasBuildRenderBitmapFromString(atlas, r.x, r.y, 2, 2, "XX" "XX", 'X');
3565 }
3566 else
3567 {
3568 // 2x2 white pixels + mouse cursors
3569 const int x_for_white = r.x;
3570 const int x_for_black = r.x + FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_DATA_W + 1;
3571 ImFontAtlasBuildRenderBitmapFromString(atlas, x_for_white, r.y, FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_DATA_W, FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_DATA_H, FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_DATA_PIXELS, '.');
3572 ImFontAtlasBuildRenderBitmapFromString(atlas, x_for_black, r.y, FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_DATA_W, FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_DATA_H, FONT_ATLAS_DEFAULT_TEX_DATA_PIXELS, 'X');
3573 }
3574 }
3575
3576 // Refresh UV coordinates
3577 atlas->TexUvWhitePixel = ImVec2((r.x + 0.5f) * atlas->TexUvScale.x, (r.y + 0.5f) * atlas->TexUvScale.y);
3578}
3579
3580static void ImFontAtlasBuildUpdateLinesTexData(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
3581{
3582 if (atlas->Flags & ImFontAtlasFlags_NoBakedLines)
3583 return;
3584
3585 // Pack and store identifier so we can refresh UV coordinates on texture resize.
3586 ImTextureData* tex = atlas->TexData;
3587 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
3588
3589 ImFontAtlasRect r;
3590 bool add_and_draw = atlas->GetCustomRect(builder->PackIdLinesTexData, &r) == false;
3591 if (add_and_draw)
3592 {
3593 ImVec2i pack_size = ImVec2i(IM_DRAWLIST_TEX_LINES_WIDTH_MAX + 2, IM_DRAWLIST_TEX_LINES_WIDTH_MAX + 1);
3594 builder->PackIdLinesTexData = atlas->AddCustomRect(pack_size.x, pack_size.y, &r);
3595 IM_ASSERT(builder->PackIdLinesTexData != ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid);
3596 }
3597
3598 // Register texture region for thick lines
3599 // The +2 here is to give space for the end caps, whilst height +1 is to accommodate the fact we have a zero-width row
3600 // This generates a triangular shape in the texture, with the various line widths stacked on top of each other to allow interpolation between them
3601 for (int n = 0; n < IM_DRAWLIST_TEX_LINES_WIDTH_MAX + 1; n++) // +1 because of the zero-width row
3602 {
3603 // Each line consists of at least two empty pixels at the ends, with a line of solid pixels in the middle
3604 const int y = n;
3605 const int line_width = n;
3606 const int pad_left = (r.w - line_width) / 2;
3607 const int pad_right = r.w - (pad_left + line_width);
3608 IM_ASSERT(pad_left + line_width + pad_right == r.w && y < r.h); // Make sure we're inside the texture bounds before we start writing pixels
3609
3610 // Write each slice
3611 if (add_and_draw && tex->Format == ImTextureFormat_Alpha8)
3612 {
3613 ImU8* write_ptr = (ImU8*)tex->GetPixelsAt(r.x, r.y + y);
3614 for (int i = 0; i < pad_left; i++)
3615 *(write_ptr + i) = 0x00;
3616
3617 for (int i = 0; i < line_width; i++)
3618 *(write_ptr + pad_left + i) = 0xFF;
3619
3620 for (int i = 0; i < pad_right; i++)
3621 *(write_ptr + pad_left + line_width + i) = 0x00;
3622 }
3623 else if (add_and_draw && tex->Format == ImTextureFormat_RGBA32)
3624 {
3625 ImU32* write_ptr = (ImU32*)(void*)tex->GetPixelsAt(r.x, r.y + y);
3626 for (int i = 0; i < pad_left; i++)
3627 *(write_ptr + i) = IM_COL32(255, 255, 255, 0);
3628
3629 for (int i = 0; i < line_width; i++)
3630 *(write_ptr + pad_left + i) = IM_COL32_WHITE;
3631
3632 for (int i = 0; i < pad_right; i++)
3633 *(write_ptr + pad_left + line_width + i) = IM_COL32(255, 255, 255, 0);
3634 }
3635
3636 // Refresh UV coordinates
3637 ImVec2 uv0 = ImVec2((float)(r.x + pad_left - 1), (float)(r.y + y)) * atlas->TexUvScale;
3638 ImVec2 uv1 = ImVec2((float)(r.x + pad_left + line_width + 1), (float)(r.y + y + 1)) * atlas->TexUvScale;
3639 float half_v = (uv0.y + uv1.y) * 0.5f; // Calculate a constant V in the middle of the row to avoid sampling artifacts
3640 atlas->TexUvLines[n] = ImVec4(uv0.x, half_v, uv1.x, half_v);
3641 }
3642}
3643
3644//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3645
3646// Was tempted to lazily init FontSrc but wouldn't save much + makes it more complicated to detect invalid data at AddFont()
3647bool ImFontAtlasFontInitOutput(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font)
3648{
3649 bool ret = true;
3650 for (ImFontConfig* src : font->Sources)
3651 if (!ImFontAtlasFontSourceInit(atlas, src))
3652 ret = false;
3653 IM_ASSERT(ret); // Unclear how to react to this meaningfully. Assume that result will be same as initial AddFont() call.
3654 return ret;
3655}
3656
3657// Keep source/input FontData
3658void ImFontAtlasFontDestroyOutput(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font)
3659{
3660 font->ClearOutputData();
3661 for (ImFontConfig* src : font->Sources)
3662 {
3663 const ImFontLoader* loader = src->FontLoader ? src->FontLoader : atlas->FontLoader;
3664 if (loader && loader->FontSrcDestroy != NULL)
3665 loader->FontSrcDestroy(atlas, src);
3666 }
3667}
3668
3669void ImFontAtlasFontRebuildOutput(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font)
3670{
3671 ImFontAtlasFontDestroyOutput(atlas, font);
3672 ImFontAtlasFontInitOutput(atlas, font);
3673}
3674
3675//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
3676
3677bool ImFontAtlasFontSourceInit(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontConfig* src)
3678{
3679 const ImFontLoader* loader = src->FontLoader ? src->FontLoader : atlas->FontLoader;
3680 if (loader->FontSrcInit != NULL && !loader->FontSrcInit(atlas, src))
3681 return false;
3682 return true;
3683}
3684
3685void ImFontAtlasFontSourceAddToFont(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font, ImFontConfig* src)
3686{
3687 if (src->MergeMode == false)
3688 {
3689 font->ClearOutputData();
3690 //font->FontSize = src->SizePixels;
3691 font->OwnerAtlas = atlas;
3692 IM_ASSERT(font->Sources[0] == src);
3693 }
3694 atlas->TexIsBuilt = false; // For legacy backends
3695 ImFontAtlasBuildSetupFontSpecialGlyphs(atlas, font, src);
3696}
3697
3698void ImFontAtlasFontDestroySourceData(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontConfig* src)
3699{
3700 IM_UNUSED(atlas);
3701 // IF YOU GET A CRASH IN THE IM_FREE() CALL HERE AND USED AddFontFromMemoryTTF():
3702 // - DUE TO LEGACY REASON AddFontFromMemoryTTF() TRANSFERS MEMORY OWNERSHIP BY DEFAULT.
3703 // - IT WILL THEREFORE CRASH WHEN PASSED DATA WHICH MAY NOT BE FREED BY IMGUI.
3704 // - USE `ImFontConfig font_cfg; font_cfg.FontDataOwnedByAtlas = false; io.Fonts->AddFontFromMemoryTTF(....., &cfg);` to disable passing ownership/
3705 // WE WILL ADDRESS THIS IN A FUTURE REWORK OF THE API.
3706 if (src->FontDataOwnedByAtlas)
3707 IM_FREE(src->FontData);
3708 src->FontData = NULL;
3709 if (src->GlyphExcludeRanges)
3710 IM_FREE((void*)src->GlyphExcludeRanges);
3711 src->GlyphExcludeRanges = NULL;
3712}
3713
3714// Create a compact, baked "..." if it doesn't exist, by using the ".".
3715// This may seem overly complicated right now but the point is to exercise and improve a technique which should be increasingly used.
3716// FIXME-NEWATLAS: This borrows too much from FontLoader's FontLoadGlyph() handlers and suggest that we should add further helpers.
3717static ImFontGlyph* ImFontAtlasBuildSetupFontBakedEllipsis(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontBaked* baked)
3718{
3719 ImFont* font = baked->OwnerFont;
3720 IM_ASSERT(font->EllipsisChar != 0);
3721
3722 const ImFontGlyph* dot_glyph = baked->FindGlyphNoFallback((ImWchar)'.');
3723 if (dot_glyph == NULL)
3724 dot_glyph = baked->FindGlyphNoFallback((ImWchar)0xFF0E);
3725 if (dot_glyph == NULL)
3726 return NULL;
3727 ImFontAtlasRectId dot_r_id = dot_glyph->PackId; // Deep copy to avoid invalidation of glyphs and rect pointers
3728 ImTextureRect* dot_r = ImFontAtlasPackGetRect(atlas, dot_r_id);
3729 const int dot_spacing = 1;
3730 const float dot_step = (dot_glyph->X1 - dot_glyph->X0) + dot_spacing;
3731
3732 ImFontAtlasRectId pack_id = ImFontAtlasPackAddRect(atlas, (dot_r->w * 3 + dot_spacing * 2), dot_r->h);
3733 ImTextureRect* r = ImFontAtlasPackGetRect(atlas, pack_id);
3734
3735 ImFontGlyph glyph_in = {};
3736 ImFontGlyph* glyph = &glyph_in;
3737 glyph->Codepoint = font->EllipsisChar;
3738 glyph->AdvanceX = ImMax(dot_glyph->AdvanceX, dot_glyph->X0 + dot_step * 3.0f - dot_spacing); // FIXME: Slightly odd for normally mono-space fonts but since this is used for trailing contents.
3739 glyph->X0 = dot_glyph->X0;
3740 glyph->Y0 = dot_glyph->Y0;
3741 glyph->X1 = dot_glyph->X0 + dot_step * 3 - dot_spacing;
3742 glyph->Y1 = dot_glyph->Y1;
3743 glyph->Visible = true;
3744 glyph->PackId = pack_id;
3745 glyph = ImFontAtlasBakedAddFontGlyph(atlas, baked, NULL, glyph);
3746 dot_glyph = NULL; // Invalidated
3747
3748 // Copy to texture, post-process and queue update for backend
3749 // FIXME-NEWATLAS-V2: Dot glyph is already post-processed as this point, so this would damage it.
3750 dot_r = ImFontAtlasPackGetRect(atlas, dot_r_id);
3751 ImTextureData* tex = atlas->TexData;
3752 for (int n = 0; n < 3; n++)
3753 ImFontAtlasTextureBlockCopy(tex, dot_r->x, dot_r->y, tex, r->x + (dot_r->w + dot_spacing) * n, r->y, dot_r->w, dot_r->h);
3754 ImFontAtlasTextureBlockQueueUpload(atlas, tex, r->x, r->y, r->w, r->h);
3755
3756 return glyph;
3757}
3758
3759// Load fallback in order to obtain its index
3760// (this is called from in hot-path so we avoid extraneous parameters to minimize impact on code size)
3761static void ImFontAtlasBuildSetupFontBakedFallback(ImFontBaked* baked)
3762{
3763 IM_ASSERT(baked->FallbackGlyphIndex == -1);
3764 IM_ASSERT(baked->FallbackAdvanceX == 0.0f);
3765 ImFont* font = baked->OwnerFont;
3766 ImFontGlyph* fallback_glyph = NULL;
3767 if (font->FallbackChar != 0)
3768 fallback_glyph = baked->FindGlyphNoFallback(font->FallbackChar);
3769 if (fallback_glyph == NULL)
3770 {
3771 ImFontGlyph* space_glyph = baked->FindGlyphNoFallback((ImWchar)' ');
3772 ImFontGlyph glyph;
3773 glyph.Codepoint = 0;
3774 glyph.AdvanceX = space_glyph ? space_glyph->AdvanceX : IM_ROUND(baked->Size * 0.40f);
3775 fallback_glyph = ImFontAtlasBakedAddFontGlyph(font->OwnerAtlas, baked, NULL, &glyph);
3776 }
3777 baked->FallbackGlyphIndex = baked->Glyphs.index_from_ptr(fallback_glyph); // Storing index avoid need to update pointer on growth and simplify inner loop code
3778 baked->FallbackAdvanceX = fallback_glyph->AdvanceX;
3779}
3780
3781static void ImFontAtlasBuildSetupFontBakedBlanks(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontBaked* baked)
3782{
3783 // Mark space as always hidden (not strictly correct/necessary. but some e.g. icons fonts don't have a space. it tends to look neater in previews)
3784 ImFontGlyph* space_glyph = baked->FindGlyphNoFallback((ImWchar)' ');
3785 if (space_glyph != NULL)
3786 space_glyph->Visible = false;
3787
3788 // Setup Tab character.
3789 // FIXME: Needs proper TAB handling but it needs to be contextualized (or we could arbitrary say that each string starts at "column 0" ?)
3790 if (baked->FindGlyphNoFallback('\t') == NULL && space_glyph != NULL)
3791 {
3792 ImFontGlyph tab_glyph;
3793 tab_glyph.Codepoint = '\t';
3794 tab_glyph.AdvanceX = space_glyph->AdvanceX * IM_TABSIZE;
3795 ImFontAtlasBakedAddFontGlyph(atlas, baked, NULL, &tab_glyph);
3796 }
3797}
3798
3799// Load/identify special glyphs
3800// (note that this is called again for fonts with MergeMode)
3801void ImFontAtlasBuildSetupFontSpecialGlyphs(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font, ImFontConfig* src)
3802{
3803 IM_UNUSED(atlas);
3804 IM_ASSERT(font->Sources.contains(src));
3805
3806 // Find Fallback character. Actual glyph loaded in GetFontBaked().
3807 const ImWchar fallback_chars[] = { font->FallbackChar, (ImWchar)IM_UNICODE_CODEPOINT_INVALID, (ImWchar)'?', (ImWchar)' ' };
3808 if (font->FallbackChar == 0)
3809 for (ImWchar candidate_char : fallback_chars)
3810 if (candidate_char != 0 && font->IsGlyphInFont(candidate_char))
3811 {
3812 font->FallbackChar = (ImWchar)candidate_char;
3813 break;
3814 }
3815
3816 // Setup Ellipsis character. It is required for rendering elided text. We prefer using U+2026 (horizontal ellipsis).
3817 // However some old fonts may contain ellipsis at U+0085. Here we auto-detect most suitable ellipsis character.
3818 // FIXME: Note that 0x2026 is rarely included in our font ranges. Because of this we are more likely to use three individual dots.
3819 const ImWchar ellipsis_chars[] = { src->EllipsisChar, (ImWchar)0x2026, (ImWchar)0x0085 };
3820 if (font->EllipsisChar == 0)
3821 for (ImWchar candidate_char : ellipsis_chars)
3822 if (candidate_char != 0 && font->IsGlyphInFont(candidate_char))
3823 {
3824 font->EllipsisChar = candidate_char;
3825 break;
3826 }
3827 if (font->EllipsisChar == 0)
3828 {
3829 font->EllipsisChar = 0x0085;
3830 font->EllipsisAutoBake = true;
3831 }
3832}
3833
3834void ImFontAtlasBakedDiscardFontGlyph(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font, ImFontBaked* baked, ImFontGlyph* glyph)
3835{
3836 if (glyph->PackId != ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid)
3837 {
3838 ImFontAtlasPackDiscardRect(atlas, glyph->PackId);
3839 glyph->PackId = ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid;
3840 }
3841 ImWchar c = (ImWchar)glyph->Codepoint;
3842 IM_ASSERT(font->FallbackChar != c && font->EllipsisChar != c); // Unsupported for simplicity
3843 IM_ASSERT(glyph >= baked->Glyphs.Data && glyph < baked->Glyphs.Data + baked->Glyphs.Size);
3844 IM_UNUSED(font);
3845 baked->IndexLookup[c] = IM_FONTGLYPH_INDEX_UNUSED;
3846 baked->IndexAdvanceX[c] = baked->FallbackAdvanceX;
3847}
3848
3849ImFontBaked* ImFontAtlasBakedAdd(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font, float font_size, float font_rasterizer_density, ImGuiID baked_id)
3850{
3851 IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] Created baked %.2fpx\n", font_size);
3852 ImFontBaked* baked = atlas->Builder->BakedPool.push_back(ImFontBaked());
3853 baked->Size = font_size;
3854 baked->RasterizerDensity = font_rasterizer_density;
3855 baked->BakedId = baked_id;
3856 baked->OwnerFont = font;
3857 baked->LastUsedFrame = atlas->Builder->FrameCount;
3858
3859 // Initialize backend data
3860 size_t loader_data_size = 0;
3861 for (ImFontConfig* src : font->Sources) // Cannot easily be cached as we allow changing backend
3862 {
3863 const ImFontLoader* loader = src->FontLoader ? src->FontLoader : atlas->FontLoader;
3864 loader_data_size += loader->FontBakedSrcLoaderDataSize;
3865 }
3866 baked->FontLoaderDatas = (loader_data_size > 0) ? IM_ALLOC(loader_data_size) : NULL;
3867 char* loader_data_p = (char*)baked->FontLoaderDatas;
3868 for (ImFontConfig* src : font->Sources)
3869 {
3870 const ImFontLoader* loader = src->FontLoader ? src->FontLoader : atlas->FontLoader;
3871 if (loader->FontBakedInit)
3872 loader->FontBakedInit(atlas, src, baked, loader_data_p);
3873 loader_data_p += loader->FontBakedSrcLoaderDataSize;
3874 }
3875
3876 ImFontAtlasBuildSetupFontBakedBlanks(atlas, baked);
3877 return baked;
3878}
3879
3880// FIXME-OPT: This is not a fast query. Adding a BakedCount field in Font might allow to take a shortcut for the most common case.
3881ImFontBaked* ImFontAtlasBakedGetClosestMatch(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font, float font_size, float font_rasterizer_density)
3882{
3883 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
3884 for (int step_n = 0; step_n < 2; step_n++)
3885 {
3886 ImFontBaked* closest_larger_match = NULL;
3887 ImFontBaked* closest_smaller_match = NULL;
3888 for (int baked_n = 0; baked_n < builder->BakedPool.Size; baked_n++)
3889 {
3890 ImFontBaked* baked = &builder->BakedPool[baked_n];
3891 if (baked->OwnerFont != font || baked->WantDestroy)
3892 continue;
3893 if (step_n == 0 && baked->RasterizerDensity != font_rasterizer_density) // First try with same density
3894 continue;
3895 if (baked->Size > font_size && (closest_larger_match == NULL || baked->Size < closest_larger_match->Size))
3896 closest_larger_match = baked;
3897 if (baked->Size < font_size && (closest_smaller_match == NULL || baked->Size > closest_smaller_match->Size))
3898 closest_smaller_match = baked;
3899 }
3900 if (closest_larger_match)
3901 if (closest_smaller_match == NULL || (closest_larger_match->Size >= font_size * 2.0f && closest_smaller_match->Size > font_size * 0.5f))
3902 return closest_larger_match;
3903 if (closest_smaller_match)
3904 return closest_smaller_match;
3905 }
3906 return NULL;
3907}
3908
3909void ImFontAtlasBakedDiscard(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font, ImFontBaked* baked)
3910{
3911 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
3912 IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] Discard baked %.2f for \"%s\"\n", baked->Size, font->GetDebugName());
3913
3914 for (ImFontGlyph& glyph : baked->Glyphs)
3915 if (glyph.PackId != ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid)
3916 ImFontAtlasPackDiscardRect(atlas, glyph.PackId);
3917
3918 char* loader_data_p = (char*)baked->FontLoaderDatas;
3919 for (ImFontConfig* src : font->Sources)
3920 {
3921 const ImFontLoader* loader = src->FontLoader ? src->FontLoader : atlas->FontLoader;
3922 if (loader->FontBakedDestroy)
3923 loader->FontBakedDestroy(atlas, src, baked, loader_data_p);
3924 loader_data_p += loader->FontBakedSrcLoaderDataSize;
3925 }
3926 if (baked->FontLoaderDatas)
3927 {
3928 IM_FREE(baked->FontLoaderDatas);
3929 baked->FontLoaderDatas = NULL;
3930 }
3931 builder->BakedMap.SetVoidPtr(baked->BakedId, NULL);
3932 builder->BakedDiscardedCount++;
3933 baked->ClearOutputData();
3934 baked->WantDestroy = true;
3935 font->LastBaked = NULL;
3936}
3937
3938// use unused_frames==0 to discard everything.
3939void ImFontAtlasFontDiscardBakes(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font, int unused_frames)
3940{
3941 if (ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder) // This can be called from font destructor
3942 for (int baked_n = 0; baked_n < builder->BakedPool.Size; baked_n++)
3943 {
3944 ImFontBaked* baked = &builder->BakedPool[baked_n];
3945 if (baked->LastUsedFrame + unused_frames > atlas->Builder->FrameCount)
3946 continue;
3947 if (baked->OwnerFont != font || baked->WantDestroy)
3948 continue;
3949 ImFontAtlasBakedDiscard(atlas, font, baked);
3950 }
3951}
3952
3953// use unused_frames==0 to discard everything.
3954void ImFontAtlasBuildDiscardBakes(ImFontAtlas* atlas, int unused_frames)
3955{
3956 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
3957 for (int baked_n = 0; baked_n < builder->BakedPool.Size; baked_n++)
3958 {
3959 ImFontBaked* baked = &builder->BakedPool[baked_n];
3960 if (baked->LastUsedFrame + unused_frames > atlas->Builder->FrameCount)
3961 continue;
3962 if (baked->WantDestroy || (baked->OwnerFont->Flags & ImFontFlags_LockBakedSizes))
3963 continue;
3964 ImFontAtlasBakedDiscard(atlas, baked->OwnerFont, baked);
3965 }
3966}
3967
3968// Those functions are designed to facilitate changing the underlying structures for ImFontAtlas to store an array of ImDrawListSharedData*
3969void ImFontAtlasAddDrawListSharedData(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImDrawListSharedData* data)
3970{
3971 IM_ASSERT(!atlas->DrawListSharedDatas.contains(data));
3972 atlas->DrawListSharedDatas.push_back(data);
3973}
3974
3975void ImFontAtlasRemoveDrawListSharedData(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImDrawListSharedData* data)
3976{
3977 IM_ASSERT(atlas->DrawListSharedDatas.contains(data));
3978 atlas->DrawListSharedDatas.find_erase(data);
3979}
3980
3981// Update texture identifier in all active draw lists
3982void ImFontAtlasUpdateDrawListsTextures(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImTextureRef old_tex, ImTextureRef new_tex)
3983{
3984 for (ImDrawListSharedData* shared_data : atlas->DrawListSharedDatas)
3985 {
3986 // If Context 2 uses font owned by Context 1 which already called EndFrame()/Render(), we don't want to mess with draw commands for Context 1
3987 if (shared_data->Context && !shared_data->Context->WithinFrameScope)
3988 continue;
3989
3990 for (ImDrawList* draw_list : shared_data->DrawLists)
3991 {
3992 // Replace in command-buffer
3993 // (there is not need to replace in ImDrawListSplitter: current channel is in ImDrawList's CmdBuffer[],
3994 // other channels will be on SetCurrentChannel() which already needs to compare CmdHeader anyhow)
3995 if (draw_list->CmdBuffer.Size > 0 && draw_list->_CmdHeader.TexRef == old_tex)
3996 draw_list->_SetTexture(new_tex);
3997
3998 // Replace in stack
3999 for (ImTextureRef& stacked_tex : draw_list->_TextureStack)
4000 if (stacked_tex == old_tex)
4001 stacked_tex = new_tex;
4002 }
4003 }
4004}
4005
4006// Update texture coordinates in all draw list shared context
4007// FIXME-NEWATLAS FIXME-OPT: Doesn't seem necessary to update for all, only one bound to current context?
4008void ImFontAtlasUpdateDrawListsSharedData(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
4009{
4010 for (ImDrawListSharedData* shared_data : atlas->DrawListSharedDatas)
4011 if (shared_data->FontAtlas == atlas)
4012 {
4013 shared_data->TexUvWhitePixel = atlas->TexUvWhitePixel;
4014 shared_data->TexUvLines = atlas->TexUvLines;
4015 }
4016}
4017
4018// Set current texture. This is mostly called from AddTexture() + to handle a failed resize.
4019static void ImFontAtlasBuildSetTexture(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImTextureData* tex)
4020{
4021 ImTextureRef old_tex_ref = atlas->TexRef;
4022 atlas->TexData = tex;
4023 atlas->TexUvScale = ImVec2(1.0f / tex->Width, 1.0f / tex->Height);
4024 atlas->TexRef._TexData = tex;
4025 //atlas->TexRef._TexID = tex->TexID; // <-- We intentionally don't do that. It would be misleading and betray promise that both fields aren't set.
4026 ImFontAtlasUpdateDrawListsTextures(atlas, old_tex_ref, atlas->TexRef);
4027}
4028
4029// Create a new texture, discard previous one
4030ImTextureData* ImFontAtlasTextureAdd(ImFontAtlas* atlas, int w, int h)
4031{
4032 ImTextureData* old_tex = atlas->TexData;
4033 ImTextureData* new_tex;
4034
4035 // FIXME: Cannot reuse texture because old UV may have been used already (unless we remap UV).
4036 /*if (old_tex != NULL && old_tex->Status == ImTextureStatus_WantCreate)
4037 {
4038 // Reuse texture not yet used by backend.
4039 IM_ASSERT(old_tex->TexID == ImTextureID_Invalid && old_tex->BackendUserData == NULL);
4040 old_tex->DestroyPixels();
4041 old_tex->Updates.clear();
4042 new_tex = old_tex;
4043 old_tex = NULL;
4044 }
4045 else*/
4046 {
4047 // Add new
4048 new_tex = IM_NEW(ImTextureData)();
4049 new_tex->UniqueID = atlas->TexNextUniqueID++;
4050 atlas->TexList.push_back(new_tex);
4051 }
4052 if (old_tex != NULL)
4053 {
4054 // Queue old as to destroy next frame
4055 old_tex->WantDestroyNextFrame = true;
4056 IM_ASSERT(old_tex->Status == ImTextureStatus_OK || old_tex->Status == ImTextureStatus_WantCreate || old_tex->Status == ImTextureStatus_WantUpdates);
4057 }
4058
4059 new_tex->Create(atlas->TexDesiredFormat, w, h);
4060 atlas->TexIsBuilt = false;
4061
4062 ImFontAtlasBuildSetTexture(atlas, new_tex);
4063
4064 return new_tex;
4065}
4066
4067#if 0
4068#define STB_IMAGE_WRITE_IMPLEMENTATION
4069#include "../stb/stb_image_write.h"
4070static void ImFontAtlasDebugWriteTexToDisk(ImTextureData* tex, const char* description)
4071{
4072 ImGuiContext& g = *GImGui;
4073 char buf[128];
4074 ImFormatString(buf, IM_COUNTOF(buf), "[%05d] Texture #%03d - %s.png", g.FrameCount, tex->UniqueID, description);
4075 stbi_write_png(buf, tex->Width, tex->Height, tex->BytesPerPixel, tex->Pixels, tex->GetPitch()); // tex->BytesPerPixel is technically not component, but ok for the formats we support.
4076}
4077#endif
4078
4079void ImFontAtlasTextureRepack(ImFontAtlas* atlas, int w, int h)
4080{
4081 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
4082 builder->LockDisableResize = true;
4083
4084 ImTextureData* old_tex = atlas->TexData;
4085 ImTextureData* new_tex = ImFontAtlasTextureAdd(atlas, w, h);
4086 new_tex->UseColors = old_tex->UseColors;
4087 IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] Texture #%03d: resize+repack %dx%d => Texture #%03d: %dx%d\n", old_tex->UniqueID, old_tex->Width, old_tex->Height, new_tex->UniqueID, new_tex->Width, new_tex->Height);
4088 //for (int baked_n = 0; baked_n < builder->BakedPool.Size; baked_n++)
4089 // IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] - Baked %.2fpx, %d glyphs, want_destroy=%d\n", builder->BakedPool[baked_n].FontSize, builder->BakedPool[baked_n].Glyphs.Size, builder->BakedPool[baked_n].WantDestroy);
4090 //IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] - Old packed rects: %d, area %d px\n", builder->RectsPackedCount, builder->RectsPackedSurface);
4091 //ImFontAtlasDebugWriteTexToDisk(old_tex, "Before Pack");
4092
4093 // Repack, lose discarded rectangle, copy pixels
4094 // FIXME-NEWATLAS: This is unstable because packing order is based on RectsIndex
4095 // FIXME-NEWATLAS-V2: Repacking in batch would be beneficial to packing heuristic, and fix stability.
4096 // FIXME-NEWATLAS-TESTS: Test calling RepackTexture with size too small to fits existing rects.
4097 ImFontAtlasPackInit(atlas);
4098 ImVector<ImTextureRect> old_rects;
4099 ImVector<ImFontAtlasRectEntry> old_index = builder->RectsIndex;
4100 old_rects.swap(builder->Rects);
4101
4102 for (ImFontAtlasRectEntry& index_entry : builder->RectsIndex)
4103 {
4104 if (index_entry.IsUsed == false)
4105 continue;
4106 ImTextureRect& old_r = old_rects[index_entry.TargetIndex];
4107 if (old_r.w == 0 && old_r.h == 0)
4108 continue;
4109 ImFontAtlasRectId new_r_id = ImFontAtlasPackAddRect(atlas, old_r.w, old_r.h, &index_entry);
4110 if (new_r_id == ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid)
4111 {
4112 // Undo, grow texture and try repacking again.
4113 // FIXME-NEWATLAS-TESTS: This is a very rarely exercised path! It needs to be automatically tested properly.
4114 IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] Texture #%03d: resize failed. Will grow.\n", new_tex->UniqueID);
4115 new_tex->WantDestroyNextFrame = true;
4116 builder->Rects.swap(old_rects);
4117 builder->RectsIndex = old_index;
4118 ImFontAtlasBuildSetTexture(atlas, old_tex);
4119 ImFontAtlasTextureGrow(atlas, w, h); // Recurse
4120 return;
4121 }
4122 IM_ASSERT(ImFontAtlasRectId_GetIndex(new_r_id) == builder->RectsIndex.index_from_ptr(&index_entry));
4123 ImTextureRect* new_r = ImFontAtlasPackGetRect(atlas, new_r_id);
4124 ImFontAtlasTextureBlockCopy(old_tex, old_r.x, old_r.y, new_tex, new_r->x, new_r->y, new_r->w, new_r->h);
4125 }
4126 IM_ASSERT(old_rects.Size == builder->Rects.Size + builder->RectsDiscardedCount);
4127 builder->RectsDiscardedCount = 0;
4128 builder->RectsDiscardedSurface = 0;
4129
4130 // Patch glyphs UV
4131 for (int baked_n = 0; baked_n < builder->BakedPool.Size; baked_n++)
4132 for (ImFontGlyph& glyph : builder->BakedPool[baked_n].Glyphs)
4133 if (glyph.PackId != ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid)
4134 {
4135 ImTextureRect* r = ImFontAtlasPackGetRect(atlas, glyph.PackId);
4136 glyph.U0 = (r->x) * atlas->TexUvScale.x;
4137 glyph.V0 = (r->y) * atlas->TexUvScale.y;
4138 glyph.U1 = (r->x + r->w) * atlas->TexUvScale.x;
4139 glyph.V1 = (r->y + r->h) * atlas->TexUvScale.y;
4140 }
4141
4142 // Update other cached UV
4143 ImFontAtlasBuildUpdateLinesTexData(atlas);
4144 ImFontAtlasBuildUpdateBasicTexData(atlas);
4145
4146 builder->LockDisableResize = false;
4147 ImFontAtlasUpdateDrawListsSharedData(atlas);
4148 //ImFontAtlasDebugWriteTexToDisk(new_tex, "After Pack");
4149}
4150
4151void ImFontAtlasTextureGrow(ImFontAtlas* atlas, int old_tex_w, int old_tex_h)
4152{
4153 //ImFontAtlasDebugWriteTexToDisk(atlas->TexData, "Before Grow");
4154 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
4155 if (old_tex_w == -1)
4156 old_tex_w = atlas->TexData->Width;
4157 if (old_tex_h == -1)
4158 old_tex_h = atlas->TexData->Height;
4159
4160 // FIXME-NEWATLAS-V2: What to do when reaching limits exposed by backend?
4161 // FIXME-NEWATLAS-V2: Does ImFontAtlasFlags_NoPowerOfTwoHeight makes sense now? Allow 'lock' and 'compact' operations?
4162 IM_ASSERT(ImIsPowerOfTwo(old_tex_w) && ImIsPowerOfTwo(old_tex_h));
4163 IM_ASSERT(ImIsPowerOfTwo(atlas->TexMinWidth) && ImIsPowerOfTwo(atlas->TexMaxWidth) && ImIsPowerOfTwo(atlas->TexMinHeight) && ImIsPowerOfTwo(atlas->TexMaxHeight));
4164
4165 // Grow texture so it follows roughly a square.
4166 // - Grow height before width, as width imply more packing nodes.
4167 // - Caller should be taking account of RectsDiscardedSurface and may not need to grow.
4168 int new_tex_w = (old_tex_h <= old_tex_w) ? old_tex_w : old_tex_w * 2;
4169 int new_tex_h = (old_tex_h <= old_tex_w) ? old_tex_h * 2 : old_tex_h;
4170
4171 // Handle minimum size first (for pathologically large packed rects)
4172 const int pack_padding = atlas->TexGlyphPadding;
4173 new_tex_w = ImMax(new_tex_w, ImUpperPowerOfTwo(builder->MaxRectSize.x + pack_padding));
4174 new_tex_h = ImMax(new_tex_h, ImUpperPowerOfTwo(builder->MaxRectSize.y + pack_padding));
4175 new_tex_w = ImClamp(new_tex_w, atlas->TexMinWidth, atlas->TexMaxWidth);
4176 new_tex_h = ImClamp(new_tex_h, atlas->TexMinHeight, atlas->TexMaxHeight);
4177 if (new_tex_w == old_tex_w && new_tex_h == old_tex_h)
4178 return;
4179
4180 ImFontAtlasTextureRepack(atlas, new_tex_w, new_tex_h);
4181}
4182
4183void ImFontAtlasTextureMakeSpace(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
4184{
4185 // Can some baked contents be ditched?
4186 //IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] ImFontAtlasBuildMakeSpace()\n");
4187 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
4188 ImFontAtlasBuildDiscardBakes(atlas, 2);
4189
4190 // Currently using a heuristic for repack without growing.
4191 if (builder->RectsDiscardedSurface < builder->RectsPackedSurface * 0.20f)
4192 ImFontAtlasTextureGrow(atlas);
4193 else
4194 ImFontAtlasTextureRepack(atlas, atlas->TexData->Width, atlas->TexData->Height);
4195}
4196
4197ImVec2i ImFontAtlasTextureGetSizeEstimate(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
4198{
4199 int min_w = ImUpperPowerOfTwo(atlas->TexMinWidth);
4200 int min_h = ImUpperPowerOfTwo(atlas->TexMinHeight);
4201 if (atlas->Builder == NULL || atlas->TexData == NULL || atlas->TexData->Status == ImTextureStatus_WantDestroy)
4202 return ImVec2i(min_w, min_h);
4203
4204 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
4205 min_w = ImMax(ImUpperPowerOfTwo(builder->MaxRectSize.x), min_w);
4206 min_h = ImMax(ImUpperPowerOfTwo(builder->MaxRectSize.y), min_h);
4207 const int surface_approx = builder->RectsPackedSurface - builder->RectsDiscardedSurface; // Expected surface after repack
4208 const int surface_sqrt = (int)sqrtf((float)surface_approx);
4209
4210 int new_tex_w;
4211 int new_tex_h;
4212 if (min_w >= min_h)
4213 {
4214 new_tex_w = ImMax(min_w, ImUpperPowerOfTwo(surface_sqrt));
4215 new_tex_h = ImMax(min_h, (int)((surface_approx + new_tex_w - 1) / new_tex_w));
4216 if ((atlas->Flags & ImFontAtlasFlags_NoPowerOfTwoHeight) == 0)
4217 new_tex_h = ImUpperPowerOfTwo(new_tex_h);
4218 }
4219 else
4220 {
4221 new_tex_h = ImMax(min_h, ImUpperPowerOfTwo(surface_sqrt));
4222 if ((atlas->Flags & ImFontAtlasFlags_NoPowerOfTwoHeight) == 0)
4223 new_tex_h = ImUpperPowerOfTwo(new_tex_h);
4224 new_tex_w = ImMax(min_w, (int)((surface_approx + new_tex_h - 1) / new_tex_h));
4225 }
4226
4227 IM_ASSERT(ImIsPowerOfTwo(new_tex_w) && ImIsPowerOfTwo(new_tex_h));
4228 return ImVec2i(new_tex_w, new_tex_h);
4229}
4230
4231// Clear all output. Invalidates all AddCustomRect() return values!
4232void ImFontAtlasBuildClear(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
4233{
4234 ImVec2i new_tex_size = ImFontAtlasTextureGetSizeEstimate(atlas);
4235 ImFontAtlasBuildDestroy(atlas);
4236 ImFontAtlasTextureAdd(atlas, new_tex_size.x, new_tex_size.y);
4237 ImFontAtlasBuildInit(atlas);
4238 for (ImFontConfig& src : atlas->Sources)
4239 ImFontAtlasFontSourceInit(atlas, &src);
4240 for (ImFont* font : atlas->Fonts)
4241 for (ImFontConfig* src : font->Sources)
4242 ImFontAtlasFontSourceAddToFont(atlas, font, src);
4243}
4244
4245// You should not need to call this manually!
4246// If you think you do, let us know and we can advise about policies auto-compact.
4247void ImFontAtlasTextureCompact(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
4248{
4249 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
4250 ImFontAtlasBuildDiscardBakes(atlas, 1);
4251
4252 ImTextureData* old_tex = atlas->TexData;
4253 ImVec2i old_tex_size = ImVec2i(old_tex->Width, old_tex->Height);
4254 ImVec2i new_tex_size = ImFontAtlasTextureGetSizeEstimate(atlas);
4255 if (builder->RectsDiscardedCount == 0 && new_tex_size.x == old_tex_size.x && new_tex_size.y == old_tex_size.y)
4256 return;
4257
4258 ImFontAtlasTextureRepack(atlas, new_tex_size.x, new_tex_size.y);
4259}
4260
4261// Start packing over current empty texture
4262void ImFontAtlasBuildInit(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
4263{
4264 // Select Backend
4265 // - Note that we do not reassign to atlas->FontLoader, since it is likely to point to static data which
4266 // may mess with some hot-reloading schemes. If you need to assign to this (for dynamic selection) AND are
4267 // using a hot-reloading scheme that messes up static data, store your own instance of FontLoader somewhere
4268 // and point to it instead of pointing directly to return value of the GetFontLoaderXXX functions.
4269 if (atlas->FontLoader == NULL)
4270 {
4271#ifdef IMGUI_ENABLE_FREETYPE
4272 atlas->SetFontLoader(ImGuiFreeType::GetFontLoader());
4273#elif defined(IMGUI_ENABLE_STB_TRUETYPE)
4274 atlas->SetFontLoader(ImFontAtlasGetFontLoaderForStbTruetype());
4275#else
4276 IM_ASSERT(0); // Invalid Build function
4277#endif
4278 }
4279
4280 // Create initial texture size
4281 if (atlas->TexData == NULL || atlas->TexData->Pixels == NULL)
4282 ImFontAtlasTextureAdd(atlas, ImUpperPowerOfTwo(atlas->TexMinWidth), ImUpperPowerOfTwo(atlas->TexMinHeight));
4283
4284 atlas->Builder = IM_NEW(ImFontAtlasBuilder)();
4285 if (atlas->FontLoader->LoaderInit)
4286 atlas->FontLoader->LoaderInit(atlas);
4287
4288 ImFontAtlasBuildUpdateRendererHasTexturesFromContext(atlas);
4289
4290 ImFontAtlasPackInit(atlas);
4291
4292 // Add required texture data
4293 ImFontAtlasBuildUpdateLinesTexData(atlas);
4294 ImFontAtlasBuildUpdateBasicTexData(atlas);
4295
4296 // Register fonts
4297 ImFontAtlasBuildUpdatePointers(atlas);
4298
4299 // Update UV coordinates etc. stored in bound ImDrawListSharedData instance
4300 ImFontAtlasUpdateDrawListsSharedData(atlas);
4301
4302 //atlas->TexIsBuilt = true;
4303
4304 // Lazily initialize char/text classifier
4305 // FIXME: This could be practically anywhere, and should eventually be parameters to CalcTextSize/word-wrapping code, but there's no obvious spot now.
4306 ImTextInitClassifiers();
4307}
4308
4309// Destroy builder and all cached glyphs. Do not destroy actual fonts.
4310void ImFontAtlasBuildDestroy(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
4311{
4312 for (ImFont* font : atlas->Fonts)
4313 ImFontAtlasFontDestroyOutput(atlas, font);
4314 if (atlas->Builder && atlas->FontLoader && atlas->FontLoader->LoaderShutdown)
4315 {
4316 atlas->FontLoader->LoaderShutdown(atlas);
4317 IM_ASSERT(atlas->FontLoaderData == NULL);
4318 }
4319 IM_DELETE(atlas->Builder);
4320 atlas->Builder = NULL;
4321}
4322
4323void ImFontAtlasPackInit(ImFontAtlas * atlas)
4324{
4325 ImTextureData* tex = atlas->TexData;
4326 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
4327
4328 // In theory we could decide to reduce the number of nodes, e.g. halve them, and waste a little texture space, but it doesn't seem worth it.
4329 const int pack_node_count = tex->Width / 2;
4330 builder->PackNodes.resize(pack_node_count);
4331 IM_STATIC_ASSERT(sizeof(stbrp_context) <= sizeof(stbrp_context_opaque));
4332 stbrp_init_target((stbrp_context*)(void*)&builder->PackContext, tex->Width, tex->Height, builder->PackNodes.Data, builder->PackNodes.Size);
4333 builder->RectsPackedSurface = builder->RectsPackedCount = 0;
4334 builder->MaxRectSize = ImVec2i(0, 0);
4335 builder->MaxRectBounds = ImVec2i(0, 0);
4336}
4337
4338// This is essentially a free-list pattern, it may be nice to wrap it into a dedicated type.
4339static ImFontAtlasRectId ImFontAtlasPackAllocRectEntry(ImFontAtlas* atlas, int rect_idx)
4340{
4341 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = (ImFontAtlasBuilder*)atlas->Builder;
4342 int index_idx;
4343 ImFontAtlasRectEntry* index_entry;
4344 if (builder->RectsIndexFreeListStart < 0)
4345 {
4346 builder->RectsIndex.resize(builder->RectsIndex.Size + 1);
4347 index_idx = builder->RectsIndex.Size - 1;
4348 index_entry = &builder->RectsIndex[index_idx];
4349 memset(index_entry, 0, sizeof(*index_entry));
4350 }
4351 else
4352 {
4353 index_idx = builder->RectsIndexFreeListStart;
4354 index_entry = &builder->RectsIndex[index_idx];
4355 IM_ASSERT(index_entry->IsUsed == false && index_entry->Generation > 0); // Generation is incremented during DiscardRect
4356 builder->RectsIndexFreeListStart = index_entry->TargetIndex;
4357 }
4358 index_entry->TargetIndex = rect_idx;
4359 index_entry->IsUsed = 1;
4360 return ImFontAtlasRectId_Make(index_idx, index_entry->Generation);
4361}
4362
4363// Overwrite existing entry
4364static ImFontAtlasRectId ImFontAtlasPackReuseRectEntry(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontAtlasRectEntry* index_entry)
4365{
4366 IM_ASSERT(index_entry->IsUsed);
4367 index_entry->TargetIndex = atlas->Builder->Rects.Size - 1;
4368 int index_idx = atlas->Builder->RectsIndex.index_from_ptr(index_entry);
4369 return ImFontAtlasRectId_Make(index_idx, index_entry->Generation);
4370}
4371
4372// This is expected to be called in batches and followed by a repack
4373void ImFontAtlasPackDiscardRect(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontAtlasRectId id)
4374{
4375 IM_ASSERT(id != ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid);
4376
4377 ImTextureRect* rect = ImFontAtlasPackGetRect(atlas, id);
4378 if (rect == NULL)
4379 return;
4380
4381 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
4382 int index_idx = ImFontAtlasRectId_GetIndex(id);
4383 ImFontAtlasRectEntry* index_entry = &builder->RectsIndex[index_idx];
4384 IM_ASSERT(index_entry->IsUsed && index_entry->TargetIndex >= 0);
4385 index_entry->IsUsed = false;
4386 index_entry->TargetIndex = builder->RectsIndexFreeListStart;
4387 index_entry->Generation++;
4388 if (index_entry->Generation == 0)
4389 index_entry->Generation++; // Keep non-zero on overflow
4390
4391 const int pack_padding = atlas->TexGlyphPadding;
4392 builder->RectsIndexFreeListStart = index_idx;
4393 builder->RectsDiscardedCount++;
4394 builder->RectsDiscardedSurface += (rect->w + pack_padding) * (rect->h + pack_padding);
4395 rect->w = rect->h = 0; // Clear rectangle so it won't be packed again
4396}
4397
4398// Important: Calling this may recreate a new texture and therefore change atlas->TexData
4399// FIXME-NEWFONTS: Expose other glyph padding settings for custom alteration (e.g. drop shadows). See #7962
4400ImFontAtlasRectId ImFontAtlasPackAddRect(ImFontAtlas* atlas, int w, int h, ImFontAtlasRectEntry* overwrite_entry)
4401{
4402 IM_ASSERT(w > 0 && w <= 0xFFFF);
4403 IM_ASSERT(h > 0 && h <= 0xFFFF);
4404
4405 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = (ImFontAtlasBuilder*)atlas->Builder;
4406 const int pack_padding = atlas->TexGlyphPadding;
4407 builder->MaxRectSize.x = ImMax(builder->MaxRectSize.x, w);
4408 builder->MaxRectSize.y = ImMax(builder->MaxRectSize.y, h);
4409
4410 // Pack
4411 ImTextureRect r = { 0, 0, (unsigned short)w, (unsigned short)h };
4412 for (int attempts_remaining = 3; attempts_remaining >= 0; attempts_remaining--)
4413 {
4414 // Try packing
4415 stbrp_rect pack_r = {};
4416 pack_r.w = w + pack_padding;
4417 pack_r.h = h + pack_padding;
4418 stbrp_pack_rects((stbrp_context*)(void*)&builder->PackContext, &pack_r, 1);
4419 r.x = (unsigned short)pack_r.x;
4420 r.y = (unsigned short)pack_r.y;
4421 if (pack_r.was_packed)
4422 break;
4423
4424 // If we ran out of attempts, return fallback
4425 if (attempts_remaining == 0 || builder->LockDisableResize)
4426 {
4427 IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] Failed packing %dx%d rectangle. Returning fallback.\n", w, h);
4428 return ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid;
4429 }
4430
4431 // Resize or repack atlas! (this should be a rare event)
4432 ImFontAtlasTextureMakeSpace(atlas);
4433 }
4434
4435 builder->MaxRectBounds.x = ImMax(builder->MaxRectBounds.x, r.x + r.w + pack_padding);
4436 builder->MaxRectBounds.y = ImMax(builder->MaxRectBounds.y, r.y + r.h + pack_padding);
4437 builder->RectsPackedCount++;
4438 builder->RectsPackedSurface += (w + pack_padding) * (h + pack_padding);
4439
4440 builder->Rects.push_back(r);
4441 if (overwrite_entry != NULL)
4442 return ImFontAtlasPackReuseRectEntry(atlas, overwrite_entry); // Write into an existing entry instead of adding one (used during repack)
4443 else
4444 return ImFontAtlasPackAllocRectEntry(atlas, builder->Rects.Size - 1);
4445}
4446
4447// Generally for non-user facing functions: assert on invalid ID.
4448ImTextureRect* ImFontAtlasPackGetRect(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontAtlasRectId id)
4449{
4450 IM_ASSERT(id != ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid);
4451 int index_idx = ImFontAtlasRectId_GetIndex(id);
4452 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = (ImFontAtlasBuilder*)atlas->Builder;
4453 ImFontAtlasRectEntry* index_entry = &builder->RectsIndex[index_idx];
4454 IM_ASSERT(index_entry->Generation == ImFontAtlasRectId_GetGeneration(id));
4455 IM_ASSERT(index_entry->IsUsed);
4456 return &builder->Rects[index_entry->TargetIndex];
4457}
4458
4459// For user-facing functions: return NULL on invalid ID.
4460// Important: return pointer is valid until next call to AddRect(), e.g. FindGlyph(), CalcTextSize() can all potentially invalidate previous pointers.
4461ImTextureRect* ImFontAtlasPackGetRectSafe(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontAtlasRectId id)
4462{
4463 if (id == ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid)
4464 return NULL;
4465 int index_idx = ImFontAtlasRectId_GetIndex(id);
4466 if (atlas->Builder == NULL)
4467 ImFontAtlasBuildInit(atlas);
4468 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = (ImFontAtlasBuilder*)atlas->Builder;
4469 IM_MSVC_WARNING_SUPPRESS(28182); // Static Analysis false positive "warning C28182: Dereferencing NULL pointer 'builder'"
4470 if (index_idx >= builder->RectsIndex.Size)
4471 return NULL;
4472 ImFontAtlasRectEntry* index_entry = &builder->RectsIndex[index_idx];
4473 if (index_entry->Generation != ImFontAtlasRectId_GetGeneration(id) || !index_entry->IsUsed)
4474 return NULL;
4475 return &builder->Rects[index_entry->TargetIndex];
4476}
4477
4478// Important! This assume by ImFontConfig::GlyphExcludeRanges[] is a SMALL ARRAY (e.g. <10 entries)
4479// Use "Input Glyphs Overlap Detection Tool" to display a list of glyphs provided by multiple sources in order to set this array up.
4480static bool ImFontAtlasBuildAcceptCodepointForSource(ImFontConfig* src, ImWchar codepoint)
4481{
4482 if (const ImWchar* exclude_list = src->GlyphExcludeRanges)
4483 for (; exclude_list[0] != 0; exclude_list += 2)
4484 if (codepoint >= exclude_list[0] && codepoint <= exclude_list[1])
4485 return false;
4486 return true;
4487}
4488
4489static void ImFontBaked_BuildGrowIndex(ImFontBaked* baked, int new_size)
4490{
4491 IM_ASSERT(baked->IndexAdvanceX.Size == baked->IndexLookup.Size);
4492 if (new_size <= baked->IndexLookup.Size)
4493 return;
4494 baked->IndexAdvanceX.resize(new_size, -1.0f);
4495 baked->IndexLookup.resize(new_size, IM_FONTGLYPH_INDEX_UNUSED);
4496}
4497
4498static void ImFontAtlas_FontHookRemapCodepoint(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFont* font, ImWchar* c)
4499{
4500 IM_UNUSED(atlas);
4501 if (font->RemapPairs.Data.Size != 0)
4502 *c = (ImWchar)font->RemapPairs.GetInt((ImGuiID)*c, (int)*c);
4503}
4504
4505static ImFontGlyph* ImFontBaked_BuildLoadGlyph(ImFontBaked* baked, ImWchar codepoint, float* only_load_advance_x)
4506{
4507 ImFont* font = baked->OwnerFont;
4508 ImFontAtlas* atlas = font->OwnerAtlas;
4509 if (atlas->Locked || (font->Flags & ImFontFlags_NoLoadGlyphs))
4510 {
4511 // Lazily load fallback glyph
4512 if (baked->FallbackGlyphIndex == -1 && baked->LoadNoFallback == 0)
4513 ImFontAtlasBuildSetupFontBakedFallback(baked);
4514 return NULL;
4515 }
4516
4517 // User remapping hooks
4518 ImWchar src_codepoint = codepoint;
4519 ImFontAtlas_FontHookRemapCodepoint(atlas, font, &codepoint);
4520
4521 //char utf8_buf[5];
4522 //IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG("[font] BuildLoadGlyph U+%04X (%s)\n", (unsigned int)codepoint, ImTextCharToUtf8(utf8_buf, (unsigned int)codepoint));
4523
4524 // Special hook
4525 // FIXME-NEWATLAS: it would be nicer if this used a more standardized way of hooking
4526 if (codepoint == font->EllipsisChar && font->EllipsisAutoBake)
4527 if (ImFontGlyph* glyph = ImFontAtlasBuildSetupFontBakedEllipsis(atlas, baked))
4528 return glyph;
4529
4530 // Call backend
4531 char* loader_user_data_p = (char*)baked->FontLoaderDatas;
4532 int src_n = 0;
4533 for (ImFontConfig* src : font->Sources)
4534 {
4535 const ImFontLoader* loader = src->FontLoader ? src->FontLoader : atlas->FontLoader;
4536 if (!src->GlyphExcludeRanges || ImFontAtlasBuildAcceptCodepointForSource(src, codepoint))
4537 {
4538 if (only_load_advance_x == NULL)
4539 {
4540 ImFontGlyph glyph_buf;
4541 if (loader->FontBakedLoadGlyph(atlas, src, baked, loader_user_data_p, codepoint, &glyph_buf, NULL))
4542 {
4543 // FIXME: Add hooks for e.g. #7962
4544 glyph_buf.Codepoint = src_codepoint;
4545 glyph_buf.SourceIdx = src_n;
4546 return ImFontAtlasBakedAddFontGlyph(atlas, baked, src, &glyph_buf);
4547 }
4548 }
4549 else
4550 {
4551 // Special mode but only loading glyphs metrics. Will rasterize and pack later.
4552 if (loader->FontBakedLoadGlyph(atlas, src, baked, loader_user_data_p, codepoint, NULL, only_load_advance_x))
4553 {
4554 ImFontAtlasBakedAddFontGlyphAdvancedX(atlas, baked, src, codepoint, *only_load_advance_x);
4555 return NULL;
4556 }
4557 }
4558 }
4559 loader_user_data_p += loader->FontBakedSrcLoaderDataSize;
4560 src_n++;
4561 }
4562
4563 // Lazily load fallback glyph
4564 if (baked->LoadNoFallback)
4565 return NULL;
4566 if (baked->FallbackGlyphIndex == -1)
4567 ImFontAtlasBuildSetupFontBakedFallback(baked);
4568
4569 // Mark index as not found, so we don't attempt the search twice
4570 ImFontBaked_BuildGrowIndex(baked, codepoint + 1);
4571 baked->IndexAdvanceX[codepoint] = baked->FallbackAdvanceX;
4572 baked->IndexLookup[codepoint] = IM_FONTGLYPH_INDEX_NOT_FOUND;
4573 return NULL;
4574}
4575
4576static float ImFontBaked_BuildLoadGlyphAdvanceX(ImFontBaked* baked, ImWchar codepoint)
4577{
4578 if (baked->Size >= IMGUI_FONT_SIZE_THRESHOLD_FOR_LOADADVANCEXONLYMODE || baked->LoadNoRenderOnLayout)
4579 {
4580 // First load AdvanceX value used by CalcTextSize() API then load the rest when loaded by drawing API.
4581 float only_advance_x = 0.0f;
4582 ImFontGlyph* glyph = ImFontBaked_BuildLoadGlyph(baked, (ImWchar)codepoint, &only_advance_x);
4583 return glyph ? glyph->AdvanceX : only_advance_x;
4584 }
4585 else
4586 {
4587 ImFontGlyph* glyph = ImFontBaked_BuildLoadGlyph(baked, (ImWchar)codepoint, NULL);
4588 return glyph ? glyph->AdvanceX : baked->FallbackAdvanceX;
4589 }
4590}
4591
4592// The point of this indirection is to not be inlined in debug mode in order to not bloat inner loop.b
4593IM_MSVC_RUNTIME_CHECKS_OFF
4594static float BuildLoadGlyphGetAdvanceOrFallback(ImFontBaked* baked, unsigned int codepoint)
4595{
4596 return ImFontBaked_BuildLoadGlyphAdvanceX(baked, (ImWchar)codepoint);
4597}
4598IM_MSVC_RUNTIME_CHECKS_RESTORE
4599
4600#ifndef IMGUI_DISABLE_DEBUG_TOOLS
4601void ImFontAtlasDebugLogTextureRequests(ImFontAtlas* atlas)
4602{
4603 // [DEBUG] Log texture update requests
4604 ImGuiContext& g = *GImGui;
4605 IM_UNUSED(g);
4606 for (ImTextureData* tex : atlas->TexList)
4607 {
4608 if ((g.IO.BackendFlags & ImGuiBackendFlags_RendererHasTextures) == 0)
4609 IM_ASSERT(tex->Updates.Size == 0);
4610 if (tex->Status == ImTextureStatus_WantCreate)
4611 IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] Texture #%03d: create %dx%d\n", tex->UniqueID, tex->Width, tex->Height);
4612 else if (tex->Status == ImTextureStatus_WantDestroy)
4613 IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] Texture #%03d: destroy %dx%d, texid=0x%" IM_PRIX64 ", backend_data=%p\n", tex->UniqueID, tex->Width, tex->Height, ImGui::DebugTextureIDToU64(tex->TexID), tex->BackendUserData);
4614 else if (tex->Status == ImTextureStatus_WantUpdates)
4615 {
4616 IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] Texture #%03d: update %d regions, texid=0x%" IM_PRIX64 ", backend_data=0x%" IM_PRIX64 "\n", tex->UniqueID, tex->Updates.Size, ImGui::DebugTextureIDToU64(tex->TexID), (ImU64)(intptr_t)tex->BackendUserData);
4617 for (const ImTextureRect& r : tex->Updates)
4618 {
4619 IM_UNUSED(r);
4620 IM_ASSERT(r.x >= 0 && r.y >= 0);
4621 IM_ASSERT(r.x + r.w <= tex->Width && r.y + r.h <= tex->Height); // In theory should subtract PackPadding but it's currently part of atlas and mid-frame change would wreck assert.
4622 //IMGUI_DEBUG_LOG_FONT("[font] Texture #%03d: update (% 4d..%-4d)->(% 4d..%-4d), texid=0x%" IM_PRIX64 ", backend_data=0x%" IM_PRIX64 "\n", tex->UniqueID, r.x, r.y, r.x + r.w, r.y + r.h, ImGui::DebugTextureIDToU64(tex->TexID), (ImU64)(intptr_t)tex->BackendUserData);
4623 }
4624 }
4625 }
4626}
4627#endif
4628
4629//-------------------------------------------------------------------------
4630// [SECTION] ImFontAtlas: backend for stb_truetype
4631//-------------------------------------------------------------------------
4632// (imstb_truetype.h in included near the top of this file, when IMGUI_ENABLE_STB_TRUETYPE is set)
4633//-------------------------------------------------------------------------
4634
4635#ifdef IMGUI_ENABLE_STB_TRUETYPE
4636
4637// One for each ConfigData
4638struct ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData
4639{
4640 stbtt_fontinfo FontInfo;
4641 float ScaleFactor;
4642};
4643
4644static bool ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcInit(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontConfig* src)
4645{
4646 IM_UNUSED(atlas);
4647
4648 ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData* bd_font_data = IM_NEW(ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData);
4649 IM_ASSERT(src->FontLoaderData == NULL);
4650
4651 // Initialize helper structure for font loading and verify that the TTF/OTF data is correct
4652 const int font_offset = stbtt_GetFontOffsetForIndex((const unsigned char*)src->FontData, src->FontNo);
4653 if (font_offset < 0)
4654 {
4655 IM_DELETE(bd_font_data);
4656 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(0, "stbtt_GetFontOffsetForIndex(): FontData is incorrect, or FontNo cannot be found.");
4657 return false;
4658 }
4659 if (!stbtt_InitFont(&bd_font_data->FontInfo, (const unsigned char*)src->FontData, font_offset))
4660 {
4661 IM_DELETE(bd_font_data);
4662 IM_ASSERT_USER_ERROR(0, "stbtt_InitFont(): failed to parse FontData. It is correct and complete? Check FontDataSize.");
4663 return false;
4664 }
4665 src->FontLoaderData = bd_font_data;
4666
4667 const float ref_size = src->DstFont->Sources[0]->SizePixels;
4668 if (src->MergeMode && src->SizePixels == 0.0f)
4669 src->SizePixels = ref_size;
4670
4671 bd_font_data->ScaleFactor = stbtt_ScaleForPixelHeight(&bd_font_data->FontInfo, 1.0f);
4672 if (src->MergeMode && src->SizePixels != 0.0f && ref_size != 0.0f)
4673 bd_font_data->ScaleFactor *= src->SizePixels / ref_size; // FIXME-NEWATLAS: Should tidy up that a bit
4674 bd_font_data->ScaleFactor *= src->ExtraSizeScale;
4675
4676 return true;
4677}
4678
4679static void ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcDestroy(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontConfig* src)
4680{
4681 IM_UNUSED(atlas);
4682 ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData* bd_font_data = (ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData*)src->FontLoaderData;
4683 IM_DELETE(bd_font_data);
4684 src->FontLoaderData = NULL;
4685}
4686
4687static bool ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcContainsGlyph(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontConfig* src, ImWchar codepoint)
4688{
4689 IM_UNUSED(atlas);
4690
4691 ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData* bd_font_data = (ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData*)src->FontLoaderData;
4692 IM_ASSERT(bd_font_data != NULL);
4693
4694 int glyph_index = stbtt_FindGlyphIndex(&bd_font_data->FontInfo, (int)codepoint);
4695 return glyph_index != 0;
4696}
4697
4698static bool ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontBakedInit(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontConfig* src, ImFontBaked* baked, void*)
4699{
4700 IM_UNUSED(atlas);
4701
4702 ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData* bd_font_data = (ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData*)src->FontLoaderData;
4703 if (src->MergeMode == false)
4704 {
4705 // FIXME-NEWFONTS: reevaluate how to use sizing metrics
4706 // FIXME-NEWFONTS: make use of line gap value
4707 const float scale_for_layout = bd_font_data->ScaleFactor * baked->Size / src->ExtraSizeScale;
4708 int unscaled_ascent, unscaled_descent, unscaled_line_gap;
4709 stbtt_GetFontVMetrics(&bd_font_data->FontInfo, &unscaled_ascent, &unscaled_descent, &unscaled_line_gap);
4710 baked->Ascent = ImCeil(unscaled_ascent * scale_for_layout);
4711 baked->Descent = ImFloor(unscaled_descent * scale_for_layout);
4712 }
4713 return true;
4714}
4715
4716static bool ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontBakedLoadGlyph(ImFontAtlas* atlas, ImFontConfig* src, ImFontBaked* baked, void*, ImWchar codepoint, ImFontGlyph* out_glyph, float* out_advance_x)
4717{
4718 // Search for first font which has the glyph
4719 ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData* bd_font_data = (ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcData*)src->FontLoaderData;
4720 IM_ASSERT(bd_font_data);
4721 int glyph_index = stbtt_FindGlyphIndex(&bd_font_data->FontInfo, (int)codepoint);
4722 if (glyph_index == 0)
4723 return false;
4724
4725 // Fonts unit to pixels
4726 int oversample_h, oversample_v;
4727 ImFontAtlasBuildGetOversampleFactors(src, baked, &oversample_h, &oversample_v);
4728 const float scale_for_layout = bd_font_data->ScaleFactor * baked->Size;
4729 const float rasterizer_density = src->RasterizerDensity * baked->RasterizerDensity;
4730 const float scale_for_raster_x = bd_font_data->ScaleFactor * baked->Size * rasterizer_density * oversample_h;
4731 const float scale_for_raster_y = bd_font_data->ScaleFactor * baked->Size * rasterizer_density * oversample_v;
4732
4733 // Obtain size and advance
4734 int x0, y0, x1, y1;
4735 int advance, lsb;
4736 stbtt_GetGlyphBitmapBoxSubpixel(&bd_font_data->FontInfo, glyph_index, scale_for_raster_x, scale_for_raster_y, 0, 0, &x0, &y0, &x1, &y1);
4737 stbtt_GetGlyphHMetrics(&bd_font_data->FontInfo, glyph_index, &advance, &lsb);
4738
4739 // Load metrics only mode
4740 if (out_advance_x != NULL)
4741 {
4742 IM_ASSERT(out_glyph == NULL);
4743 *out_advance_x = advance * scale_for_layout;
4744 return true;
4745 }
4746
4747 // Prepare glyph
4748 out_glyph->Codepoint = codepoint;
4749 out_glyph->AdvanceX = advance * scale_for_layout;
4750
4751 // Pack and retrieve position inside texture atlas
4752 // (generally based on stbtt_PackFontRangesRenderIntoRects)
4753 const bool is_visible = (x0 != x1 && y0 != y1);
4754 if (is_visible)
4755 {
4756 const int w = (x1 - x0 + oversample_h - 1);
4757 const int h = (y1 - y0 + oversample_v - 1);
4758 ImFontAtlasRectId pack_id = ImFontAtlasPackAddRect(atlas, w, h);
4759 if (pack_id == ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid)
4760 {
4761 // Pathological out of memory case (TexMaxWidth/TexMaxHeight set too small?)
4762 IM_ASSERT(pack_id != ImFontAtlasRectId_Invalid && "Out of texture memory.");
4763 return false;
4764 }
4765 ImTextureRect* r = ImFontAtlasPackGetRect(atlas, pack_id);
4766
4767 // Render
4768 stbtt_GetGlyphBitmapBox(&bd_font_data->FontInfo, glyph_index, scale_for_raster_x, scale_for_raster_y, &x0, &y0, &x1, &y1);
4769 ImFontAtlasBuilder* builder = atlas->Builder;
4770 builder->TempBuffer.resize(w * h * 1);
4771 unsigned char* bitmap_pixels = builder->TempBuffer.Data;
4772 memset(bitmap_pixels, 0, w * h * 1);
4773
4774 // Render with oversampling
4775 // (those functions conveniently assert if pixels are not cleared, which is another safety layer)
4776 float sub_x, sub_y;
4777 stbtt_MakeGlyphBitmapSubpixelPrefilter(&bd_font_data->FontInfo, bitmap_pixels, w, h, w,
4778 scale_for_raster_x, scale_for_raster_y, 0, 0, oversample_h, oversample_v, &sub_x, &sub_y, glyph_index);
4779
4780 const float ref_size = baked->OwnerFont->Sources[0]->SizePixels;
4781 const float offsets_scale = (ref_size != 0.0f) ? (baked->Size / ref_size) : 1.0f;
4782 float font_off_x = ImFloor(src->GlyphOffset.x * offsets_scale + 0.5f); // Snap scaled offset.
4783 float font_off_y = ImFloor(src->GlyphOffset.y * offsets_scale + 0.5f);
4784 font_off_x += sub_x;
4785 font_off_y += sub_y + IM_ROUND(baked->Ascent);
4786 float recip_h = 1.0f / (oversample_h * rasterizer_density);
4787 float recip_v = 1.0f / (oversample_v * rasterizer_density);
4788
4789 // Register glyph
4790 // r->x r->y are coordinates inside texture (in pixels)
4791 // glyph.X0, glyph.Y0 are drawing coordinates from base text position, and accounting for oversampling.
4792 out_glyph->X0 = x0 * recip_h + font_off_x;
4793 out_glyph->Y0 = y0 * recip_v + font_off_y;
4794 out_glyph->X1 = (x0 + (int)r->w) * recip_h + font_off_x;
4795 out_glyph->Y1 = (y0 + (int)r->h) * recip_v + font_off_y;
4796 out_glyph->Visible = true;
4797 out_glyph->PackId = pack_id;
4798 ImFontAtlasBakedSetFontGlyphBitmap(atlas, baked, src, out_glyph, r, bitmap_pixels, ImTextureFormat_Alpha8, w);
4799 }
4800
4801 return true;
4802}
4803
4804const ImFontLoader* ImFontAtlasGetFontLoaderForStbTruetype()
4805{
4806 static ImFontLoader loader;
4807 loader.Name = "stb_truetype";
4808 loader.FontSrcInit = ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcInit;
4809 loader.FontSrcDestroy = ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcDestroy;
4810 loader.FontSrcContainsGlyph = ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontSrcContainsGlyph;
4811 loader.FontBakedInit = ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontBakedInit;
4812 loader.FontBakedDestroy = NULL;
4813 loader.FontBakedLoadGlyph = ImGui_ImplStbTrueType_FontBakedLoadGlyph;
4814 return &loader;
4815}
4816
4817#endif // IMGUI_ENABLE_STB_TRUETYPE
4818
4819//-------------------------------------------------------------------------
4820// [SECTION] ImFontAtlas: glyph ranges helpers
4821//-------------------------------------------------------------------------
4822// - GetGlyphRangesDefault()
4823// Obsolete functions since 1.92:
4824// - GetGlyphRangesGreek()
4825// - GetGlyphRangesKorean()
4826// - GetGlyphRangesChineseFull()
4827// - GetGlyphRangesChineseSimplifiedCommon()
4828// - GetGlyphRangesJapanese()
4829// - GetGlyphRangesCyrillic()
4830// - GetGlyphRangesThai()
4831// - GetGlyphRangesVietnamese()
4832//-----------------------------------------------------------------------------
4833
4834// Retrieve list of range (2 int per range, values are inclusive)
4835const ImWchar* ImFontAtlas::GetGlyphRangesDefault()
4836{
4837 static const ImWchar ranges[] =
4838 {
4839 0x0020, 0x00FF, // Basic Latin + Latin Supplement
4840 0,
4841 };
4842 return &ranges[0];
4843}
4844
4845#ifndef IMGUI_DISABLE_OBSOLETE_FUNCTIONS
4846const ImWchar* ImFontAtlas::GetGlyphRangesGreek()
4847{
4848 static const ImWchar ranges[] =
4849 {
4850 0x0020, 0x00FF, // Basic Latin + Latin Supplement
4851 0x0370, 0x03FF, // Greek and Coptic
4852 0,
4853 };
4854 return &ranges[0];
4855}
4856
4857const ImWchar* ImFontAtlas::GetGlyphRangesKorean()
4858{
4859 static const ImWchar ranges[] =
4860 {
4861 0x0020, 0x00FF, // Basic Latin + Latin Supplement
4862 0x3131, 0x3163, // Korean alphabets
4863 0xAC00, 0xD7A3, // Korean characters
4864 0xFFFD, 0xFFFD, // Invalid
4865 0,
4866 };
4867 return &ranges[0];
4868}
4869
4870const ImWchar* ImFontAtlas::GetGlyphRangesChineseFull()
4871{
4872 static const ImWchar ranges[] =
4873 {
4874 0x0020, 0x00FF, // Basic Latin + Latin Supplement
4875 0x2000, 0x206F, // General Punctuation
4876 0x3000, 0x30FF, // CJK Symbols and Punctuations, Hiragana, Katakana
4877 0x31F0, 0x31FF, // Katakana Phonetic Extensions
4878 0xFF00, 0xFFEF, // Half-width characters
4879 0xFFFD, 0xFFFD, // Invalid
4880 0x4e00, 0x9FAF, // CJK Ideograms
4881 0,
4882 };
4883 return &ranges[0];
4884}
4885
4886static void UnpackAccumulativeOffsetsIntoRanges(int base_codepoint, const short* accumulative_offsets, int accumulative_offsets_count, ImWchar* out_ranges)
4887{
4888 for (int n = 0; n < accumulative_offsets_count; n++, out_ranges += 2)
4889 {
4890 out_ranges[0] = out_ranges[1] = (ImWchar)(base_codepoint + accumulative_offsets[n]);
4891 base_codepoint += accumulative_offsets[n];
4892 }
4893 out_ranges[0] = 0;
4894}
4895
4896const ImWchar* ImFontAtlas::GetGlyphRangesChineseSimplifiedCommon()
4897{
4898 // Store 2500 regularly used characters for Simplified Chinese.
4899 // Sourced from https://zh.wiktionary.org/wiki/%E9%99%84%E5%BD%95:%E7%8E%B0%E4%BB%A3%E6%B1%89%E8%AF%AD%E5%B8%B8%E7%94%A8%E5%AD%97%E8%A1%A8
4900 // This table covers 97.97% of all characters used during the month in July, 1987.
4901 // You can use ImFontGlyphRangesBuilder to create your own ranges derived from this, by merging existing ranges or adding new characters.
4902 // (Stored as accumulative offsets from the initial unicode codepoint 0x4E00. This encoding is designed to helps us compact the source code size.)
4903 static const short accumulative_offsets_from_0x4E00[] =
4904 {
4905 0,1,2,4,1,1,1,1,2,1,3,2,1,2,2,1,1,1,1,1,5,2,1,2,3,3,3,2,2,4,1,1,1,2,1,5,2,3,1,2,1,2,1,1,2,1,1,2,2,1,4,1,1,1,1,5,10,1,2,19,2,1,2,1,2,1,2,1,2,
4906 1,5,1,6,3,2,1,2,2,1,1,1,4,8,5,1,1,4,1,1,3,1,2,1,5,1,2,1,1,1,10,1,1,5,2,4,6,1,4,2,2,2,12,2,1,1,6,1,1,1,4,1,1,4,6,5,1,4,2,2,4,10,7,1,1,4,2,4,
4907 2,1,4,3,6,10,12,5,7,2,14,2,9,1,1,6,7,10,4,7,13,1,5,4,8,4,1,1,2,28,5,6,1,1,5,2,5,20,2,2,9,8,11,2,9,17,1,8,6,8,27,4,6,9,20,11,27,6,68,2,2,1,1,
4908 1,2,1,2,2,7,6,11,3,3,1,1,3,1,2,1,1,1,1,1,3,1,1,8,3,4,1,5,7,2,1,4,4,8,4,2,1,2,1,1,4,5,6,3,6,2,12,3,1,3,9,2,4,3,4,1,5,3,3,1,3,7,1,5,1,1,1,1,2,

4949 0x2000, 0x206F, // General Punctuation
4950 0x3000, 0x30FF, // CJK Symbols and Punctuations, Hiragana, Katakana
4951 0x31F0, 0x31FF, // Katakana Phonetic Extensions
4952 0xFF00, 0xFFEF, // Half-width characters
4953 0xFFFD, 0xFFFD // Invalid

4956 if (!full_ranges[0])

4960 }
4961 return &full_ranges[0];

4966 // 2999 ideograms code points for Japanese
4967 // - 2136 Joyo (meaning "for regular use" or "for common use") Kanji code points
4968 // - 863 Jinmeiyo (meaning "for personal name") Kanji code points
